title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 14 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 14 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 14 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 6.82%. Some traders adopt separate quotations.Market wait-and-see sentiment increased. PBF at Shandong port dealt 930 yuan/mt, decreased 40 yuan/mt from last Friday; SSF at Shandong port dealt 580-585 yuan/mt, decreased 40-50 yuan/mt from last Friday.
